reviews.author: Anita Yang
reviews.text: Thank you for organizing the event, the team was very happy and we had many cocktails!

reviews.author: Peter and Renan
reviews.text: Thank you Tatiana, we couldn't have asked for a better wedding planner! You made us feel very special and comfortable throughout our time working with you. We are eternally grateful for you and your entire team! ❤️

reviews.author: Maria José Bonilla
reviews.text: Hi Tati, how are you? Look, I'm still receiving messages congratulating me on how beautiful everything was. My husband's entire family was too surprised, they told me it's the best wedding they've ever attended!! I was truly more than satisfied with your work, you completely exceeded my expectations!! It was the wedding of our dreams, thank you so much for everything!!!

reviews.author: Hannah Catherine
reviews.text: Tatiana, now that we've had time to recover with our families, we wanted to thank you enormously for everything you did for us. Not just on Friday, but also the 12 months before. You were so patient, so adaptable, and so organized that you kept our planning on track and really thought of everything. Plus, you were so easy to get to know, and your humor and disposition were key to making us feel so happy and confident on our wedding day that everything would be perfect. My family can't stop talking about how fantastic you were on Friday.

reviews.author: Maria Rodriguez
reviews.text: I would buy again without hesitation.

reviews.author: Luis Gomez
reviews.text: Everything was perfect from start to finish.
